criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence in its features and functionalities.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall user interface design, ease of use, and user satisfaction.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and quality of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size and market presence.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and novelty of the app's features and approach.
